I o | MINISTRY OF ENVIRONMENT AND FORESTS NOTIFICATION ‘ New Delhi, the 11th April, 2008 G.S.R. 280(E).—In exercise of the powers conferred by Sections 6 and 25 of the Environment (Protection) Act, 1986 (29 of 1986), the Central Government hereby makes the following rules further to amend the Environment (Protec- tion) Rules, 1986, namely :i— 1 2 1) These rules may be called the Environment (Protection) Second Amendment Rules, 2008. 0) They shall come into force on the date of their publication in the Official Gazette. n the Environment (Protection) Rules, 1986, in Schedule 1,— a) in serial number 88, relating to ‘Emission Standards for new generator sets (upto 19 kilowatt) run on petrol and kerosene with implementation schedule’; in paragraph D, existing item number shall be renurabered as (i), (ii), (iii) and (iv) respectively, and after item number (iv) so renumbered, the follow- ing item number and entries shall be inserted, namely :— “(v) Tnterational Centre for Automotive Technology, Manesar (Haryana)”; (b) in serial number 95, relating to ‘Emission Limits for New Diesel Engines (upto 800 KW) for Generator sets (Gensets) Applications’; in sub-paragraph 8, after item (ii) and the entries relating thereto, the following item and entries shall be inserted, namely :— R “(jii) Internationa Centre for Automotive Technology, Manesar (Haryana).”. {F. No. Q-1502212/01-CPA(PL)] R.K. VAISH, Jt. Secy. Note :— The principal rules were published in the Gazette of India vide number S.0. 844(E) dated 19th November, 1986 and $ubsequently amended vide S.0. 433(E) dated 18th April, 1987, 5.0. 64(E) dated 18th January, 1988, S.0. 3(E)|dated 3rd January, 1989, S.0. 190(E) dated 15th March, 1989, G.S.R. 913(E) dated the 24th October, 1989, S.0{12(E) dated the 8th January, 1990, G.S.R. 742(E) dated the 30th August, 1990, S.0. 23(E) dated the 16th Januhiry, 1991, G.S.R. 93(E) dated the 21st February; 1991, G.S.R. 95(E) dated the 12th February, 1992, G.S.R 329(E) dated the 13th March, 1992, G.S.R. 475(E) dated the 5th May, 1992, G.S.R. 797(E) dated the 1st October, 1991, G.S.R. 386(E) dated the 28th April, 1993, G.S.R. 422(E) dated the 19th May, 1993, G.S.R. 801(E) dated the 315t December, 1993, G.S.R. 176(E) dated the 3rd April, 1996, G.SR. 631(E) dated the 31st October, 1997, G.S.R. 504(E) dated the 20th August, 1998, G.S.R. 7(E) dated the 2nd January, 1999, G.S.R. 682(E) dated the 5th Octdber, 1999, G.S.R. 742(E) dated the 25th September, 2000, G.S.R. 72(E) dated the 6th February, 2001, G.S.R. 54(H) dated the 22nd January, 2002, G.S.R. 371(E) dated thel 7th May, 2002, G.S.R. 489(E) dated the 9th July, 2002, S.0. 1088(E) dated the 1 1th October, 2002 and G.S.R. 849(E) dated the 30th December, 2002, G.S.R. 520(E) datefl 15t July, 2003, G.S.R. 92(E) dated 29th January, 2004, G.S.R. 448(E) dated 12th July, 2004, Corrigenda, G.SR. 520(E) dated [2th August, 2004, G.S.R. 272(E) dated 5th May, 2003, G.8.R. 315(E) dated 16th May, 2005, G.SIR. 546(E) dated 30th August, 2005, G.S.R. 46(E) dated 3rd February; 2006, G.S.R. 464(E) dated 7th August, 2006 and G.S.R. 566(E) dated 29th August, 2007, G.S.R. 704(E) dated 12th November, 2007 and G.S.R. 186(E) datefl 18th March, 2008. - Printed by thie Manager, Govt. of India Press, Ring Road, Mayapuri, New Delhi-110064 and Published by the Controller of Publications, Delhi-110054. -- 2 of 2 --
